title: Computer Use Agents (Copilots)
summary: Show how a computer-use agent can carry out a software task from a plain-language instruction and then demonstrate the steps in a recorded video.
inputPlaceholder: Describe the software task the copilot should complete in tools like Canvas.
examplesCaption: Choose a prompt, then press Enter to load the software-action demo from the beginning.
outputCaption: The video stays hidden until Enter is pressed so the demo still feels like a prompt-to-action interaction.

examplePrompts.label: Canvas quiz announcement
examplePrompts.prompt: Go to Canvas and post my quiz announcement for Tuesday.
